description: A medical assistant uses a population health tool to send reminders to all female patients over 50 who are due for a mammogram.

nodes.task_description: Run a report to identify all active female patients aged 50+ who have not had a mammogram in the last year.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a list of patients who are due for screening.

nodes.task_description: Select a pre-written mammogram reminder message template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent chooses the appropriate communication template.

nodes.task_description: Send the reminder to the list of patients via their preferred communication method (e.g., email, text message).

expected_outcome.value: The outreach campaign is successfully launched to improve screening rates.
